Localization.Description: A Windows Firewall setting was changed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A Windows Firewall setting has changed on host {event_src.host}. Modified profile: "{object.name}". Parameter type: {object.type}. Parameter value: {object.value}
A Windows Firewall setting has changed on host {event_src.host}. Modified profile: "{object.name}". Parameter type: {object.type}
